# Raise Ready - llms.txt

> Raise Ready provides 60+ free interactive financial tools, 5 books, Excel templates, web apps, and advisory services for founders and individuals building financial literacy, raising capital, and planning exits.

## About

Raise Ready is a financial intelligence platform by Yanni Papoutsi. It covers three stages of a founder's journey: personal financial readiness (Start Ready), fundraising (Raise Ready), and exit planning (Exit Ready). All tools are free to use in the browser with no signup required.

## Products

### Free Tools (60+)
- 18 personal finance calculators: net worth, budgeting, debt payoff, compound growth, retirement, salary negotiation, buy vs rent, credit cards, tax brackets, Roth vs Traditional, student loans, mortgage, insurance, personal runway, and more
- 14 fundraising tools (each with dedicated page, benchmarks, FAQ): funding readiness score, runway calculator, unit economics, revenue model, headcount planner, P&L, scenario planning, sensitivity analysis, valuation, dilution, SAFE notes, multi-round dilution, pitch deck scorecard, exit proceeds estimator
- Raise Ready tools URL pattern: https://www.raisereadybook.com/tools/raise-ready/{01-14}-{tool-name}.html
- 30 exit planning tools: exit proceeds, EBITDA bridge, valuation multiples, earnout optimizer, PE rollover, data room checklist, working capital, LOI comparator, advisor fees, tax optimization, post-exit planning
- URL: https://www.raisereadybook.com/tools/

### Software
- Financial Model Builder (finance.raisereadybook.com): Browser-based 5-year financial model with 3 scenarios, hiring plan, unit economics, board-ready reports. From $9.99/month.
- Personal Finance App (app.raisereadybook.com): 18 interactive personal finance tools plus startup financial model builder. From $4.99/month.

### Excel Templates
- Complete Financial Model ($49): 15-sheet investor-ready model with 5-year monthly projections, 3 scenarios, cap table, KPI dashboard
- Personal Finance Workbook ($49): 9-sheet workbook covering budgeting, debt payoff, investing, retirement, net worth
- Raise Ready Calculator Toolkit ($9.99): 14-tab workbook with all fundraising calculators (307 formulas)
- Start Ready Calculator Toolkit ($9.99): 18-tab workbook with all personal finance calculators (109 formulas)
- Exit Ready Calculator Toolkit ($9.99): 30-tab workbook with all exit planning calculators (162 formulas)

### Books ($9.99 each on Amazon)
- Start Ready: Personal finance playbook (281 pages)
- Raise Ready: Fundraising playbook (376 pages)
- Analytics Ready: OKRs, KPIs, and data strategy (333 pages)
- Model Ready: Financial modeling deep-dive (395 pages)
- Exit Ready: Exit planning playbook (300 pages)

### Services
- Model + Video Session: $299
- Fundraising Readiness Audit: $990
- Model Build: $5,000
- Investor Materials Package: $8,000
- Fractional Fundraise Advisory: $2,000/month
